recentTweets.text: Expand your career horizons at the Well-Being Fair! Stop by the Resume Open House in Longworth TODAY for a 1:1 resume consultation with House experts - or register for the virtual session this Friday from 1-3 p.m. ET. https://t.co/A3jKKkS2ly https://t.co/mSdeuLrGIQ

Kick off the official first day of summer at the #WellBeingFair: Tend to your well-being and grow your own happiness with a plant from today’s well-being session, courtesy of the @USBotanicGarden 🪴 https://t.co/TvVMGYTjTW

TY to everyone who participated in yesterday's #WellBeingFair tour of the @USBotanicGarden! More exciting opportunities to connect with nature on #CapitolHill & USBG horticulturists await! Stay tuned for more info at: https://t.co/A3jKKkS2ly https://t.co/zX1hPJo5hm

It's been ruff and we’ve all been working like a dog. But today, House staff got to de-stress with our paw-pular service dog friends for a paw-some day at the Well-Being Fair! 🐕‍🦺 Join us later this week for more well-being fun! #WellBeingMonth https://t.co/A3jKKkS2ly https://t.co/AMwLrppOt7
The rumors are true! Fresh popcorn is back in the Longworth Convenience Store 11 AM – 3 PM! 🍿 🍿 https://t.co/qvHro5mg2O

For any staff impacted by this morning's incident at the Potomac Avenue Metro, the Office of Employee Assistance is always here to offer free, confidential counseling. You are not alone. https://t.co/srJ1jHhGWb

All the grounds are strong**
 
And the coffee's great**
 
Just go for a walk**
 
To Cannon Coffee Cart*** https://t.co/vgnFJYqFjV
Rep where you work no matter where you go! Grab some of the limited-edition House stickers in the House Gift Shop while they last! #NationalStickerDay https://t.co/Q7kfnktGTl

Looking for an affordable gym membership with an easy commute? Join the House Staff Fitness Center!

✔️Fitness programs & group classes
✔️On-demand training
✔️Showers & locker rooms
✔️New fitness equipment

Even better, if you join before Feb 1, you’ll get a second month free. https://t.co/Mt8fReAUFg

Over the past several months, staff from CAO & @uscapitol have been on the move – literally! 

Together, they’ve been working around the clock helping freshmen members set up their new offices & assisting returning members as they settle into their new spaces. https://t.co/sGjZU5TAoM

Don’t miss today’s #CAOCyber “Phishing Year in Review” info session. Register by 12:00 p.m. ET to learn about hacking tactics and strategies for protecting your data. Come prepared with #cybersecurity questions for a Q&A session to follow. https://t.co/kwMPpwL94p https://t.co/2qxVWmN9kE

The #CAOCyber monthly info session series continues! Register now for “Phishing Year in Review” on December 15 to learn more about tactics used by hackers and strategies for protecting your data. Then, tune in afterwards for the Q&A session. https://t.co/kwMPpx2KsZ https://t.co/Kts1cqXqr7

The 2022 #CapitolChristmasTree was officially lit earlier this week and will light up the Capitol grounds each night until January 1. Read more about this cherished tradition and the significance behind this year's tree - "Ruby" the red spruce: https://t.co/fcg0ySuQiF https://t.co/MIN0svRfZz

Celebrate the holiday season with a gift from the People’s House! Check your list and check it twice - the House Gift Shop has all things nice. 🎁 Stop by for the holiday sale running until December 9 and save 20% on qualifying purchases. Learn more today! https://t.co/PWaZbYuKy9 https://t.co/Lcpp0My16h

Happening today! Register for #CAOCyber’s “Cybersecurity for the Holidays” by 1:00 pm ET to learn about specific cyber threats surrounding the holidays and best practices for staying safe. Bring your #cybersecurity questions for the follow up Q&A. https://t.co/lWRyhMGLMW https://t.co/txsIjPRBoL

2022's #CapitolChristmasTree is a 78-foot red spruce from the Pisgah National Forest in NC. Affectionately known as “Ruby,” this year’s tree arrived at the U.S. Capitol after a 14-day-long journey. Learn more about Ruby 🎄 and this annual tradition: https://t.co/SEyoETbaYL https://t.co/DyQJN1Jz1L

This week, House Creative Services captured the official photo of newly elected House Members of the 118th Congress during New Member Orientation. Check out the behind-the-scenes recap of the 118th Congress Freshman Class photo shoot. https://t.co/dteiqbhh61

Federal Benefits Open Season starts this week! Review your insurance plans, re-enroll, or make any necessary changes before December 12. You can also speak with participating health insurance providers at the virtual Health Benefits Fair. Learn more today: https://t.co/Z4LqTVSEPQ https://t.co/7KekYYkRmH

The #CAOCyber monthly webinar series continues! Register for “Cybersecurity for the Holidays” on  November 22 at 1 p.m. ET to learn about specific cyber threats surrounding the holidays and best practices for staying safe with a Q&A session to follow. https://t.co/lWRyhMGLMW https://t.co/WHpBgOt7Iz

Stop by the CAO #Cybersecurity Services Fair today between 1:00 p.m. and 4:00 pm! Meet experts from the CAO Office of Cybersecurity and industry leaders while learning about cybersecurity best practices. https://t.co/YIw8GbHVfA https://t.co/8XGDx8iNxu
The CAO #Cybersecurity Pop-Up is happening now! Stop by the Longworth Cafeteria anytime between 11 a.m. and 2 p.m. to get your cybersecurity questions answered.

Happening today! Register for #CAOCyber‘s “Cyber Threats and Attacks” at the House” info session before 1:00 p.m. ET to learn how a cyber-attack works and how to protect the House. Come prepared with your #cybersecurity questions! Sign up now. https://t.co/djIX7PKkfO https://t.co/WFH3x8gH9Y

Happening today! Register for #CAOCyber’s Seasonal Scams and Internet Safety before 1:00 p.m. ET to learn about seasonal scams and best practices for protecting yourself. Come prepared with your #cybersecurity questions! https://t.co/kKjlIwTtgS https://t.co/lCgpSwXvic
The CAO #Cybersecurity Pop-Up is happening now! Stop by the Longworth Cafeteria anytime between 11 a.m. and 2 p.m. to get your cybersecurity questions answered.

Happening today! Register for #CAOCyber’s Social Media Security before 1:00 p.m. ET to learn about how bad actors use social media to gather intelligence, the dangers of oversharing online, and best practices for protecting yourself. https://t.co/CZXDavq1cZ https://t.co/8z7Gukv3SK

This October is National Cybersecurity Awareness Month! Join the CAO's Office of Cybersecurity for an exciting lineup of events to help you improve your cyber health. Register today for this month’s “Cybersecurity at the House” info sessions:  https://t.co/kKjlIxb4Fs https://t.co/74orPmTgFz

📣Join the #CAOCyber team this October for three new info sessions about timely cybersecurity topics, how they apply at the House, and how staff can protect themselves from cyber threats. Learn more about each session and register today: https://t.co/hlMEqeFDFT

Last chance to register for #CAOCyber‘s “How to Handle Sensitive Information at the House” today at 1:00 p.m. ET. Learn what is considered “sensitive” and how to protect it. Come prepared with your #cybersecurity questions! Sign up now: https://t.co/hknaWYlXhJ https://t.co/qXfLR2Y70j

The #CAOCyber monthly info session series continues! Register now for “How to Handle Sensitive Information at the House,” on September 14. Learn all about how sensitive information is stolen & how to protect it with our experts; a Q&A session will follow. https://t.co/hknaWYlXhJ https://t.co/sy6sEg7tb2

Are you doing enough to protect your data? Learn about the steps you can take to protect your data at home and at the House on Thursday, August 25, at 1:00 p.m. ET. Sign up for the #CAOCyber info session today! 
https://t.co/8raq2VufR0 https://t.co/FbWOqwbER6

Happening today! Register for "Using Passwords and Multi-factor Authentication" hosted by #CAOCyber before 1:00 p.m. ET to learn about password best practices and multi-factor authentication at the House, and ask your #cybersecurity questions. https://t.co/kC51568sIP

What’s the secret to strong security? A strong password! Learn about what makes a strong password and how passwords and multi-factor authentication protect you and the House on July 28 at 1:00 p.m. ET. Sign up for the #CAOCyber info session today! https://t.co/CZXDavq1cZ https://t.co/QGPQHss34R

Happening today at 1:30 p.m. ET:  #CAOCyber ‘s “Cyber Safe Travel at the House” info session. Join us to learn how to stay safe while traveling and working at the House and get your #cybersecurity travel questions answered. Sign up now: https://t.co/HkebiPBGbH https://t.co/1Q4QCTZM4G

Traveling this summer? Avoid getting hacked with help from the Office of Cybersecurity! Register today for this month’s #CAOCyber session, “Cyber Safe Travel at the House,” on June 30. A Q&A session will follow the briefing. Sign up on the Staff Academy website. https://t.co/RLXuXlFS5q

Happening today! Register for #CAOCyber ‘s “Cybersecurity in the Cloud” info session by 1:00 p.m. ET to learn about how the cloud is used at the House and best practices for using it. We look forward to answering your #cybersecurity questions. Sign up now: https://t.co/tzZ1sZ7uAa

📣Interested in working for the House? Submit your resume for popular jobs in House offices in D.C. and across the nation. Create your profile and easily submit, update, and track separate resumes for consideration. Get started today: https://t.co/EHBxTxLvKr https://t.co/II4vrL6D3A

Not all clouds bring rain! Learn about the internet-based cloud and best practices for using it at the House. Register today for #CAOCyber's “Cybersecurity in the Cloud" info session. A Q&A session will follow the briefing. https://t.co/tzZ1sZ7uAa https://t.co/1H6vhA61om

Check out the Office of Cybersecurity’s Cyber Bulletins Magazine, a quarterly publication with information on continuously evolving security threats, what you should be aware of, and how to protect yourself and the House. Download the Spring 2022 issue: https://t.co/rGeRvrOy7S https://t.co/7VoueTCgwr

Happening today! Register for #CAOCyber‘s “OPSEC and Your Online Footprint” info session by 2:00 p.m. ET to learn about operational security and how your online data is tracked. We look forward to answering your #cybersecurity questions. https://t.co/tzZ1sZp5YK https://t.co/lX9AelSBg9

Watch your digital footprint! Register for "OPSEC and Your Online Footprint" on Thursday, April 28, at 2:00 p.m. ET to learn how your data is collected online and how to enhance your security: https://t.co/tzZ1sZ7uAa

The #CAOCyber monthly info session series continues! Join us on Thursday, April 28, to learn about operational security (OPSEC), how much of your data is tracked online, and best practices for reducing your footprint. Register today: https://t.co/tzZ1sZp5YK https://t.co/rkkDopsdMB

Today marks the 52nd anniversary of #EarthDay. The CAO remains deeply committed to environmental stewardship. Our Sustainability Working Group has implemented several initiatives to reduce the House's footprint. Learn more about sustainability at the CAO: https://t.co/XEM3D4LoA2 https://t.co/aqs6Wtytyx
RT @RepMoulton: Tucked away in Rayburn House Office Building, there are workshops with teams of skilled craftsmen & craftswomen who make &…
The CAO is incredibly proud of our staff who so deservedly received this recognition.
The House HR Hub recognizes the unique nature of working at the House, and the CAO is proud to have partnered with @ModernizeCmte and other stakeholders on this important and innovative service.

Don’t miss out! Register by 1:00 p.m. ET today to attend #CAOCyber‘s “Phishing at the House” info session. We look forward to answering your #cybersecurity questions! https://t.co/UbM8kw1AjS https://t.co/kRw9xh0IPH

To mark the end of #WomensHistoryMonth, we’re shining a light on the Women of the House. From behind-the-scenes of Congress to those who represent us, these women are helping to lead the way, day-in and day-out. Watch them in action: https://t.co/4CIJsOc9My https://t.co/tQsSvvxJwV

#CAOCyber’s monthly info sessions continue! Register today for “Phishing at the House” on March 29 at 1:00 pm ET. You’ll learn what phishing is, what it looks like, and #howto keep your data safe. A Q&A session will also follow the info session. https://t.co/UbM8kvJZsk https://t.co/mylHT8z6vn

For #SpringBreak travelers, never plug your device into foreign USB ports. For more House cyber tips, visit HouseNet:
https://t.co/Pi5rJSEbtl https://t.co/g1ViKv6ZFN

Cyber safety is everyone’s responsibility. Visit HouseNet to learn about the safety measures your office can take to help bolster cybersecurity at the House. 
https://t.co/Pi5rJSmA4L https://t.co/ewSFmbdKp4

Don’t miss out! Register by 1:00 p.m. ET today to attend #CAOCyber's "Cybersecurity at the House" info session. Learn about #security risks at the House and today’s high-profile cybersecurity topics with Q&A. Sign up now: https://t.co/tzZ1sZ7uAa https://t.co/FVRYrv6962

Want to be an original member of a first-of-its-kind team at the U.S. House of Representatives? ⬇️

📣We’re looking for a UX Designer, Product Manager, and Software Engineer to join our new House Digital Service! 

📝Apply now at: https://t.co/PEsEIBIYNm

#CAOCyber info sessions are back for 2022! Register today for “Cybersecurity at the House,” on Tuesday, February 22, at 1:00 pm ET. Learn about security risks at the House and #howto keep your data safe! Sign up now: https://t.co/tzZ1sZp5YK https://t.co/B3KTxQDFWo

#CAOCyber is hosting its Cybersecurity and International Travel info session today at 1:00 p.m. ET. Register now to learn how to digitally secure your data. 
https://t.co/vQcClgmNsg

#DidYouKnow when traveling abroad, host countries can monitor your phone calls and online activities? Register now for the Cybersecurity and International Travel info session on 12/15 at 1:00 p.m. to learn how to stay cybersecure during your travels. 
https://t.co/vQcClgmNsg

Being cyber-aware is important when traveling internationally. Join #CAOCyber for their Cybersecurity and International Travel info session on Wednesday, December 15, at 1:00 p.m. ET, to learn how to protect your devices. Visit: https://t.co/vQcClg5cAI https://t.co/fF2H641Cb4

It's the holiday season (the holiday season!). So hoop-de-do and dickory dock, and don't forget to hang up your sock!" 🧦🎄Grab your stocking stuffers from the House Gift Shop's annual Holiday Sale this week, running from November 29 'til December 3! https://t.co/iifmdIXeNi https://t.co/aMKSQ104sM

2021's #CapitolChristmasTree is a 84 ft. White Fir from the Six Rivers National Forest in California. For the 2nd year in a row, the Capitol Tree was selected virtually. Learn more about how this year’s tree was chosen & its journey to the U.S. Capitol: https://t.co/xhaGWjq3om https://t.co/kS4AzZCUMM

The virtual Annual Health Benefits Fair starts today at 1 p.m.! Here’s your chance to speak directly with participating health insurance providers and vendors. Learn more on HouseNet: https://t.co/Dj2amPznnO https://t.co/H3Nst6un01

Scammers steal millions of credit card information during the holiday season. Register for the #CAOCyber info session, "Safe Internet Use & Seasonal Scams," on November 17, at 10:00 a.m. ET, to learn how to avoid credit card identity theft: https://t.co/omIUlGE1oI

assessment.posture: No captured Kurdistan social posture yet
assessment.summary: The local archive has not captured a tweet from this account that matches TOR Phi's Kurdistan Lens terms yet. Capture more timeline pages and targeted Kurdistan searches before drawing a social-media conclusion.
assessment.whatItWasLike: No Kurdistan, Kurds, KRG/IKBY, Erbil, Peshmerga, Northern Iraq, PKK/YPG, Iraq/Syria, Yazidi/Sinjar, or energy-linked tweet is present in the profile window yet.
